triggers: how do i goldenize and keep it base
how do i goldenize and keep it level 4
entries.response:
To goldenize and keep a Pokémon base/Level 4:

1) Teach the Pokémon a **non-damaging move** (for example: Haze).
2) Let that Pokémon **faint** in the battle.
3) Switch to a **higher-level Pokémon** to defeat the Eevee.

Because the goldenized Pokémon did not deal damage, it will remain base/Level 4.

triggers: what are the current golden day golds
entries.response:
The **current Golden Day golds** are listed in:

• The **pinned messages** in the Trades channel
• The **event announcements** on Discord

Always check those locations for the most up-to-date list.

triggers: how do you make a pokemon golden
how to make a golden pokemon
entries.response:
To goldenize a Pokémon:

• Solve the **community riddle** to find **3 Pokémon and 3 items**.
• Place the Pokémon in the **first three slots** of your roster.
• Attach the **corresponding items** to those Pokémon in the correct order.
• Go to the **Evolution Gym**.
• Defeat the Eevee.

After the battle, the **first Pokémon in your roster becomes golden**.

triggers: can i goldenize on christmas and new years
goldenize on christmas and new years
do christmas and new years count separately
are christmas and new years separate golden days
entries.response:
Yes. **Christmas and New Year’s count as separate Golden Days**.

Even though they usually share the same goldens, you may goldenize your **full allowed amount on each day**.

triggers: how many goldens can i make
how many golds can i make
how many golds for golden day
entries.response:
Golden limits depend on activity:

**Active users**:
• 1 golden per account per Golden Day
• Up to **5 total per Golden Day**
• Applies separately to:
  – Christmas
  – New Year’s
  – August 2nd

**Inactive users**:
• 1 golden per Golden Day
• Total of **2** during Christmas/New Year’s
• **1** on August 2nd

triggers: what days can i make golds
entries.response:
You can goldenize on the following **Golden Days**:

• **Christmas Day** — December 25
• **New Year’s Eve + Day** — December 31 & January 1 (counts as **one** Golden Day)
• **Shrimpy’s Birthday** — August 2

triggers: i won a contest when will i receive my prize
when do i get my contest prize
how long does contest prize take
entries.response:
Contest prize delivery can vary.

• Some prizes are delivered **instantly**
• Others may take **some time**, depending on the contest
• Mods often **transfer prizes directly to your account**

If you haven’t received a trade notification, **check your account** — the prize may already be there.

triggers: im new how do i start
im new where do i start
new player how do i start
new here how do i start
first time playing how do i start
just started what do i do
what do i do at the start
entries.response:
Great question, here are some useful resources:

• **Explore the wiki**: https://wiki.tppc.info/Getting_Started
• **Quests and freebies**: https://forums.tppc.info/showthread.php?t=621060
• **Written guides**: https://forums.tppc.info/showthread.php?p=11516673#post11516673

triggers: what are the best training pokemon
what pokemon should i train with
what pokemon are best for normal training
best pokemon to level with outside training challenge
what are good trainers for regular exp grinding
entries.response:
That’s debatable, but popular choices include **Breloom**, **Blaziken**, **Gallade**, and **Heracross**.

The best option can also depend on the **time of day** you train.

For more detailed breakdowns, see:
https://wiki.tppc.info/Training_Guide

triggers: how many promos can i get
how many power plant prizes can i get
entries.response:
You may receive **one promo / Power Plant prize per account**.

This applies across all **legitimate active accounts**, of which you are allowed **up to 5**.

triggers: how do i link my rpg id to my forum account
how to link rpg and forum
entries.response:
It can be a bit tricky.

Follow the instructions in this guide:
https://forums.tppc.info/showthread.php?t=95

triggers: how do i become discord verified
entries.response:
To become **Discord verified**:

• Send your **Discord ID** to a **forum moderator**
• Examples include **Space Cowboy** or **Jigglypuff**

A moderator will handle the verification from there.

New Starter Quests are a way for **new and returning players** who have little or nothing to get started collecting Pokémon.

For more information, see:
https://forums.tppc.info/showthread.php?t=621060

If your account has been **banned or hacked**, please contact a **moderator** for more information.

You can find a list of **active staff members** here:
https://wiki.tppc.info/TPPC_Staff

If you’ve **forgotten your password or lockdown password**, please contact a **moderator** for assistance.

You can find a list of **active staff members** here:
https://wiki.tppc.info/TPPC_Staff

triggers: why can't i catch more pokemon
entries.response:
TPPC has a **box limit**.

The maximum is **756 Pokémon**.

If your box is full, you’ll need to **trade some Pokémon out** to make space before you can catch more.

triggers: why can't I complete this quest
entries.response: Uh oh! Have you tried putting the **quest Pokémon** in your **box or roster**?

Here are the **stat bonuses** for different Pokémon types:

• **Shiny Pokémon**: +5 to all Stats at all times.
• **Dark Pokémon**: -4 to all Stats during the **day**, +15 to all Stats during the **night**.
• **Golden Pokémon**: +15 to all Stats at all times.

triggers: how do I get golden pokemon
entries.response:
You can get **Golden Pokémon** through:

• **Trading**
• **Buying**
• **Events**
• **Contests**
• **Golden Day**

See here for more information: https://wiki.tppc.info/Golden_Pok%C3%A9mon

entries.question: What are the trade caps by rank?
examples: what cap does commander rank get
are trading caps different for commanders
what are the trade level caps by rank
entries.intentDescription: trade cap limits by rank, commander cap, captain cap, max trade level allowed, points required to unlock each rank
entries.response:
Here are the **trade caps** based on rank:

```text
Rank        | Points Required To Unlock | Max Trade Level Allowed
------------|--------------------------|------------------------
Grunt       | 1                        | 2,500
Private     | 10                       | 2,500
Specialist  | 100                      | 2,500
Corporal    | 1,000                    | 2,500
Sergeant    | 10,000                   | 2,500
Lieutenant  | 100,000                  | 2,500
Captain     | 1,000,000                | 4,000
Major       | 10,000,000               | 5,500
Colonel     | 100,000,000              | 7,000
General     | 1,000,000,000            | 8,500
Commander   | 10,000,000,000           | 10,000
```
Maintenance occurs at **5 AM EST** and usually lasts for **1 hour**.

On TPPC:

• **Day** refers to **6 AM - 6 PM** TPPC time.
• **Night** refers to **6 PM - 6 AM** TPPC time.

triggers: what are the power plant perks
entries.response:
Power Plant perks include:

• **Faster egg hatching** (half the usual time)
• **Discounted Pokémon** on the buy page (~33% off)
• **Discounted Team Stat rewards** (~25% off)
• And possibly **additional Team Rewards**!

See here for more info: https://wiki.tppc.info/Power_Plant

triggers: what does UL, b/o, nft, etc mean
entries.response: Type !glossary <term> for a definition of a particular term. Also see https://forums.tppc.info/showthread.php?p=11516674#post11516674 for more information.

entries.question: Why didn't I receive the full price for the pokemon I sold?
examples: why did my sold pokemon only pay half
how much money do i receive when a pokemon sells
why do sold pokemon give half market value
how much cash do i get when my pokemon is bought
why was the payout half when my pokemon sold
entries.intentDescription: sale payout, half value after a pokemon is bought, tax on completed sales, money received after a successful sale, buyer discount from power plant
entries.response:
Once your Pokémon is bought, you will receive **half of its market value** — you have to pay the tax man! Players on the team which is currently in control of the **Power Plant** receive **33% off** on the Buy Pokémon page. This discount only applies to the buyer; the seller still ends up making **half of the market value of the original, non-discounted price**.

See here for more info: https://wiki.tppc.info/Buying_and_Selling_Guide

entries.question: Can I macro or automate clicking?
examples: can i leave something running while i am nearby
can i automate grinding if i am watching
can i let battles run on their own
entries.answer: No. Macros, autoclickers, and other automation are not allowed. If you are unsure whether something counts as automation, assume it is not allowed and ask staff first.

entries.question: Can I gamble?
entries.answer: No. Gambling, wagers, and similar betting arrangements are not allowed. The only exception is staff-sanctioned gambling, such as gambling for a prize upgrade in a staff-run contest.

entries.question: Can I share or trade accounts?
examples: can i give my account to someone else
can i transfer ownership of my account
can i hand my account to a friend
can someone else take over my account permanently
entries.answer: No. Do not share, transfer, sell, trade, or give away accounts.

entries.question: How do I beat a tower or challenge?
examples: how do i beat x tower
how do i beat x challenge
how do i beat a tower challenge
how do i beat this challenge
entries.answer: There is no single best answer for every tower or challenge. Check the moves section, available guides, or JJman, and ask for help with the specific tower or challenge you are stuck on.

entries.question: How does fatigue work in training challenge?
examples: how does fatigue work in tc
what is fatigue in training challenge
does tc get worse the longer i play
does training challenge become less efficient over time
does fatigue make tc rewards worse
does fatigue build up during tc
why does tc slow down after a while
entries.answer: Training Challenge fatigue kicks in after a 4-hour window of intermittent or continuous training and lasts for 2 hours. To reset the fatigue timer, wait 2 hours.

entries.question: When does training challenge end?
entries.answer: Training Challenge ends at Sunday 5 AM TPPC time during maintenance. Results are announced at 7 AM TPPC time, and prizes are distributed at 10 AM TPPC time.

entries.question: When does safari zone end?
entries.answer: Safari Zone is a weekly challenge that starts on Sunday at 10 AM TPPC time and ends on Saturday at 10 PM TPPC time. The Safari Zone itself is open daily from 10 AM to 10 PM TPPC time.

entries.question: What is the best training gym?
examples: what gym should i train at
entries.answer: There is no universal best gym for every account. The best option depends on your team, goals, and what you can beat consistently. See https://wiki.tppc.info/Training_Accounts for a list of training accounts. Pro tip: the GratzMatt Gym lets you attack with any level Pokemon. If your Pokemon is too weak to KO with a Fighting move, you can attach X Accuracy and use Sheer Cold to OHKO the Blisseys.

entries.question: How do I get mega pokemon, mega stones, or mega evolve?
examples: how do i get mega pokemon
how do i get mega stones
entries.answer: Mega Evolution is possible, but not all Mega Stones are obtainable yet. For the currently available ones, see https://wiki.tppc.info/Category:Mega_Stones

entries.question: Can I catch question mark pokemon, and what are they?
examples: can i catch question mark pokemon
why do some pokemon have question mark gender
why do some pokemon have ? gender
what does question mark pokemon mean
what is a pokemon with question mark gender
what are the (?) pokemon on tppc
why does a pokemon show (?) instead of male or female
what does the ? symbol on a pokemon gender mean
what does the question mark symbol on a pokemon gender mean
what does the ? symbol on a pokemon mean
entries.answer: These are ungendered (?) Pokemon, and they are only obtainable through trading. See https://wiki.tppc.info/Pokemon_Genders#Ungendered_Pok.C3.A9mon for more information.

entries.question: Do secret swap pokemon keep their gender?
examples: do secret swap pokemon keep gender
entries.answer: Do not assume a Secret Swap Pokemon will keep the same gender. Check the specific Secret Swap rules or examples before relying on the result.

entries.question: Can I breed shiny or dark pokemon?
entries.answer: No. Breeding only produces normal variants.

entries.question: What are engagers?
entries.answer: Engagers do not have any powers on the forum, Trainer's Corner. In Discord they have limited abilities such as applying roles, setting up contests, timing out members, and kicking members. They cannot ban or verify. Engagers do not have access to account 1000000 or other contest or mod storage accounts. They may recommend or organize prizes, but transfers are handled by staff. Reference: https://wiki.tppc.info/Community_Engagement

entries.question: Do my pokemon have abilities like in the games?
examples: do my pokemon have ability effects
entries.answer: No. Pokemon on TPPC do not use main-series-style abilities the same way the handheld games do.

entries.question: Why are some pokemon over level 100 or below level 5?
examples: why are some pokemon over level 100
why are some pokemon below level 5
entries.answer: Some Pokemon can exist above level 100 or below level 5 because of special sources, older mechanics, swaps, promotions, or event-history exceptions.

entries.question: What is my pokemon worth, and is there a rate list?
examples: how much is my pokemon worth
is there any official price guide for pokemon values
is there an official value guide
is there a pricing guide for pokemon worth
do you have a list of pokemon values
is there a public rate guide
is there some official guide for valuing unobtainables
is there a guide for pricing unobtainables
entries.answer: There is no official universal rate list, especially for unobtainables. Ask publicly for opinions, compare recent trades, and do not rely on any single fixed price guide.

entries.question: What are the stat modifiers on TPPC?
examples: what stats do shiny dark and golden pokemon get
entries.answer: Different variants receive stat boosts based on the variant, and some depend on time of day. Shiny gets +5 to all stats. Dark gets -4 during the day and +15 at night. Golden gets +15 at all times. Reference: https://wiki.tppc.info/Bonus

entries.question: Why can't I change my team faction?
examples: why cant i change my team
entries.answer: You generally cannot freely switch team faction whenever you want. If faction changes are limited or locked, that is expected.

entries.question: Can I turn off ads on the RPG?
entries.answer: There is no built-in option to disable ads unless you use an ad blocker.

entries.question: Is there a dark mode on the RPG?
examples: can i use dark mode on the rpg
entries.answer: There is no official built-in dark mode on the RPG. If you want one, you can use a Chrome extension or the dark mode userscript by Darkness: https://darknesspwnsu.github.io/tppc-tools/userscripts/

entries.question: Why can't I trade or sell my Suicune, Raikou, or Entei?
entries.answer: Suicune, Raikou, and Entei cannot be traded.

entries.question: Can I delete my account?
examples: how do i delete my tppc account
entries.answer: Account deletion is generally not available as a normal self-service option. If this is a serious issue, contact staff.

entries.question: What is the best pokemon for training challenge?
examples: what should i use in training challenge
best pokemon specifically for training challenge
what should i use for tc runs
best pokemon in the training challenge event
entries.answer: There is no single best Pokemon for every Training Challenge setup. Prioritize Pokemon that evolve quickly and have a good Attack stat, usually over 100. Also check the eligibility list at https://www.tppcrpg.net/training_challenge.php because banned Pokemon cannot be used.

entries.question: How do I report somebody, or I have been scammed?
examples: how do i report a scammer
entries.answer: Report scams and suspicious behavior to staff, moderators, or community engagers, and include as much evidence as possible. Do not try to handle it privately if you think you were scammed.

entries.question: When will version 9 be released?
entries.answer: There is no confirmed Version 9 release date unless TPPC staff announce one. Anything else is speculation.

entries.question: What is fatigue?
entries.answer: Training Challenge fatigue kicks in after a 4-hour window of intermittent or continuous training and lasts for 2 hours. To reset the fatigue timer, wait 2 hours.

entries.question: How do I claim my birthday prize?
examples: how do i get my birthday prize
entries.answer: If you are celebrating or recently celebrated your birthday, you may be eligible to redeem a prize from 1 million. Check https://forums.tppc.info/showthread.php?t=602881 for eligibility details and enrollment.

entries.question: Can I buy stuff with real life money, or do intersite trades?
examples: can i buy stuff with irl money
can i buy pokemon with real life money
can i trade for things outside tppc
entries.answer: No. Intersite trades and real-money purchases or sales are not allowed.

entries.question: Do unsold pokemon return to me after the sale timer ends?
examples: do unsold pokemon come back to me
what happens if my pokemon does not sell
return sold pokemon after time limit
do pokes return after time limit
if nobody buys my listing does the pokemon eventually come back
does my listing come back to me if it does not sell
do sale listings expire back into my box automatically
when a listing ends does the pokemon return
if my pokemon doesn't sell on the buy page do i get it back
when the buy page timer ends does my pokemon return
if my market sale expires do i get it back
when 24h sale ends do i get my poke back
do i get my pokemon back if nobody buys it on the buy page
entries.intentDescription: unsold pokemon returns to your account after listing expires, buy page sale timer ending without a buyer, market listing expiration, pokemon comes back if it does not sell
entries.answer: No. The Pokemon is lost to the sands of time.

entries.question: What is the advent calendar?
entries.answer: The advent calendar is a seasonal feature with daily rewards or actions during the event period. It is typically hosted by L3, and the details are up to their discretion, so reach out to them directly with follow-up questions.

entries.question: What are the new starter quests?
entries.answer: New starter quests are beginner-focused quests meant to guide early progress. Check https://forums.tppc.info/showthread.php?t=621060 to see whether they are currently available and whether you are eligible to participate.

entries.question: What is the TPPC lotto or lottery?
entries.answer: The TPPC lottery is a weekly game where users can enter for a 1 in 120 chance at a prize. Enter here: https://forums.tppc.info/showthread.php?t=641631

entries.question: What is the best way to level up?
examples: how do i level up fast
entries.answer: The best leveling method depends on your training Pokemon, your level, and the gym you are using. See https://wiki.tppc.info/Training_Guide and https://wiki.tppc.info/Training_Accounts for more information.

entries.question: How do I reactivate an account, or recover a lost account?
examples: how do i reactivate an account
how do i get my old account back
entries.answer: Reactivation is currently not available.

entries.question: Why is contest almost closed all the time in Discord?
examples: why is contest closed all the time
why cant i post in contest
entries.answer: Contest channels are usually only opened during specific windows or for specific uses, so seeing them closed most of the time is normal.

entries.question: Can I trade items or RPG cash?
entries.answer: Items cannot be traded. The only exception is staff, who can create or remove items on your account, usually for contests. RPG cash can be traded for pixels, but there is no fixed rate for the value of RPG money.
